title: vault: JSON re-serialized on no-field path, losing original byte representation
description: secretx-hashicorp-vault/src/lib.rs when no ?field= param is given, calls serde_json::to_string(&data) to reassemble the KV data map. The original JSON from Vault is deserialized and re-serialized, which changes field order, whitespace, and numeric representation. Trigger: put() writes JSON with specific formatting → get() returns different whitespace/ordering. Round-trip fidelity is broken. Fix: preserve the raw response bytes from Vault and return them directly when no field extraction is requested.
